1.description: Distribution of reportedt-statistics from factor studies, 1963 to 2012. Evidence from Harvey, Liu, and Zhu (2016).

2.description: Percent of research papers reporting support for the tested hypothesis by field. Source: Fanelli (2010).

3.description: “Positive” results increase over time in the science literature. Data from Fanelli (2012).

4.description: Impact of selection (file drawer effect) onp-values. Panels from Head et al. (2015). The solid lines represent the distribution ofp-values. The dashed lines show the impact of selection.

5.description: Impact ofp-hacking onp-values. Panels from Head et al. (2015). The solid lines represent the distribution ofp-values. The dashed lines show the impact ofp-hacking.

6.description: The distribution ofp-values in factor studies. Data from Harvey, Liu, and Zhu (2016).

7.description: The SD-MBF Illustrated. Figure from Nuzzo (2014).
